# CWE-454: security flag initialized from untrusted request at startup.
lang: go
file: CWE-454-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var enforceMFA bool

func BootstrapSecurity(r *gin.Engine, db *gorm.DB) {
	r.POST("/bootstrap", func(c *gin.Context) {
		enforceMFA = c.PostForm("enforce_mfa") == "true"
	})
	db.Exec("UPDATE settings SET mfa = ?", enforceMFA)
}
